hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: tests whether C0037 R0003 price-memory-density candidate schedule entries can be re-ranked by C0031-C0036 recent negative-memory same-direction and opposite-direction schedule context plus C0037 robustness fragility evidence; not a C0037 threshold, score, cost-buffer, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, monthly filter, or retry nudge

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution economics
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: not a threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, cost-buffer, monthly filter, capital, or retry nudge; it changes the source interaction, feature, model, label, and trade-ranking surfaces by combining C0037 candidate evidence with C0031-C0036 negative-memory context while preserving MT5 schedule replay portability
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: fold-local post-SC0006 synthesis that uses C0037 R0003 price-memory-density candidate schedule entries as the generator and C0031-C0036 recent negative-memory schedule co-occurrence as cross-campaign context, without source OOS PnL entry selection

notes: proxy evidence is a reference surface only
weak proxy results must still continue to MT5 paired validation
mechanical parity compares scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and lifecycle behavior

feature.summary: C0037 R0003 price-memory-density candidate score plus C0031-C0036 same-direction negative-memory cluster, opposite-direction conflict credit, source diversity, fold-loss density, recent negative-memory pressure, C0037 robustness fragility context, and spread pressure; no feature set selected

label.summary: price-memory-density followthrough survival conditioned by recent negative-memory co-occurrence and robustness fragility context; no label selected

model.summary: fold-local post-SC0006 negative-context synthesis ranker over C0037 candidate schedule entries and C0031-C0036 failure-memory context; no model family selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot daily-ranked C0037 R0003 schedule entries re-ranked by cross-campaign negative-memory context and replayed through existing MT5 schedule parity and tick evidence
